title: Severe Drought — Horn of Africa
desc: Rainfall deficit exceeding 60% across Somalia, Ethiopia and northern Kenya. SPI index at -2.1, worst in 40 years.

title: IPC Phase 4 Alert — Sudan
desc: 6.1M people facing emergency food insecurity in North Darfur and Kordofan regions. Conflict and displacement remain primary drivers.

title: Crop Stress — Punjab Wheat Belt, India
desc: NDVI anomaly of −0.18 detected across 2.4M hectares of wheat. Above-average temperatures (+3°C) causing accelerated grain fill.

title: Reservoir Critical — Lake Kariba
desc: Lake Kariba at 34% capacity following 3rd consecutive below-normal rainy season. Hydroelectric power generation reduced by 40%.

title: Flash Flood Risk — Bangladesh & Myanmar
desc: Pre-monsoon heavy rainfall detected. 1.8M people in low-lying areas at risk. River gauges showing 180% of normal discharge.

title: Locust Swarm Activity — Sahel Region
desc: Desert locust breeding sites confirmed in Mali, Niger and Burkina Faso. Early-stage infestation affecting 480,000 ha of cropland.

title: Planting Window Advisory — West Africa
desc: Optimal sorghum and millet planting window opens in 14 days across the Sahel. Soil moisture conditions favourable following early rains.

title: Above-Normal Rains Forecast — East Africa
desc: IRI 3-month forecast shows 65% probability of above-normal rainfall for Greater Horn of Africa. NDVI recovery expected by June.
